mapper.select:
SELECT ws.id, ws.station_code, ws.station_name, ws.line_id, ws.station_type, ws.status, ws.created_at, ws.updated_at FROM workstation ws WHERE ws.is_delete = 0
AND ws.station_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{stationName}, '%')
AND ws.line_id = #{lineId}
ORDER BY ws.created_at DESC
SELECT ws.id, ws.station_code, ws.station_name, ws.line_id, ws.station_type, ws.status, ws.created_at, ws.updated_at FROM workstation ws WHERE ws.id = #{id} AND ws.is_delete = 0
SELECT ws.id, ws.station_code, ws.station_name, ws.line_id FROM workstation ws WHERE ws.is_delete = 0 ORDER BY ws.station_code ASC
